Advertisement Packages

Flexible options to reach our engaged audience. All packages include detailed performance metrics and dedicated support.

Banner Package
Display advertisements on our website pages
$500 - $2,000/month
  • Leaderboard banners (728x90)
  • Medium rectangle (300x250)
  • Mobile-responsive design
  • Monthly performance report
  • Targeted placement options
Most Popular
Content Sponsorship
Sponsor specific content or newsletter editions
$1,500 - $5,000/campaign
  • Sponsored article inclusion
  • Logo on featured content
  • Newsletter feature (50K+ subscribers)
  • Social media shoutout
  • Dedicated landing page
Event Partnership
Associate your brand with our events
$3,000 - $10,000/event
  • Co-branded event materials
  • Speaking opportunity
  • Exhibition booth
  • Delegate list access
  • Post-event reporting
Annual Partnership
Year-long strategic partnership
$25,000 - $100,000/year
  • All advertising packages included
  • Priority placement
  • Custom reporting dashboard
  • Dedicated account manager
  • Board advisory invitation

Upcoming Campaign Opportunities

Sponsor our high-impact campaigns and connect with audiences during key moments in Kenya's budget cycle.

Open
June 2026
FY 2026 Budget Season

Kenya's annual budget reading coverage and analysis

Expected Reach:500,000+ pageviews
Open
July 2026
Youth Civic Engagement Month

Youth-focused civic education and participation campaign

Expected Reach:200,000+ engaged youth
Coming Soon
September 2026
County Budget Tracker Launch

New tool launch for tracking county-level budgets

Expected Reach:100,000+ users
Advertising Guidelines
All advertisements on Budget Ndio Story must adhere to our standards
  • All advertisements must align with our mission of budget transparency
  • No political advertising or partisan content
  • No advertising for harmful products (tobacco, alcohol, etc.)
  • All sponsored content must be clearly disclosed
  • We reserve the right to reject any advertisement

Advertisement review typically takes 2-3 business days. Contact us for custom packages or long-term partnerships.

Ready to Reach Our Global Audience?

Get in touch to discuss custom advertising solutions tailored to your organization's goals and budget.

Contact Sales

We turn national and county budgets into clear insights, practical analysis, and trackable evidence to enhance youth participation and accountability.

Data Privacy

Welcome to **BudgetNdioStory Support Desk**! 👋 I'm here to help you with any questions or issues you may have. How can I assist you today? 💡 I use AI trained on public budget documents. Your conversations help us improve but aren't shared with third parties.
